title: Oops! All mobs.
description: Makes end and nether mobs spawn in the overworld!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/468590d9d252fda71423f2ebace8f77ce51eb452_0.webp)

# **Mod Description**

The dimensions have collapsed... and the Overworld will never be the same.

The barriers between realms are gone. The Nether’s flames and the End’s void have spilled into your once-safe world. Nowhere is safe.


## **Features:**


- Ghasts, magma cubes, wither skeletons, hoglins, piglins, piglin brutes, endermites, shulkers, blazes and striders all spawn in the overworld now.
